load_failed_error: Failed to load catalogue source data for the moment editor.
search_placeholder: find moment by id or title
search_empty: Enter a moment id or title.
missing_moment_param: Search for a moment by id or title.
import_save_mode_unavailable_hint: Local catalogue server unavailable. Moment import is disabled.
import_context_hint: Import a staged moment markdown file as draft source, then review and publish it from this editor.
import_empty_state: Preview a source file to inspect the resolved moment metadata.
import_file_description: filename only; the source file is resolved from var/docs/catalogue/import-staging/moments/
import_preview_status_invalid: Fix source-file issues before importing the moment.
import_mode_loaded: Preview the staged moment file below.
import_source_summary: Moment prose is imported as body-only Markdown. Metadata is stored in catalogue source JSON, not prose front matter.
import_image_guidance: Missing images are acceptable in this phase. The public moment page handles missing hero images cleanly.
import_preview_image_missing: no source image found; media generation will be blocked
import_source_result_summary: Import writes draft prose and metadata only. Publish from this editor when ready.
import_result_missing_preview: Preview the source file before importing.
save_mode_unavailable_hint: Local catalogue server unavailable. Save is disabled.
save_status_saving_and_updating: Saving source record and updating public moment...
save_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload the moment before saving again.
save_result_success_applied: Saved source changes and updated the public moment at {saved_at}.
save_result_success_partial: Source changes were saved at {saved_at}, but the public update failed.
save_result_unchanged: Source already matches the current form values.
build_preview_template: Public update preview: moment {moment_ids}; catalogue search {search_rebuild}.
build_preview_unpublished: Public update unavailable while the moment is not published.
build_result_success: Public moment updated at {completed_at}. Studio Activity updated.
publication_status_invalid: Publication is available only for draft or published moments.
publication_status_validation_error: Fix validation errors before changing publication state.
unpublish_confirm_dirty_note: Unsaved form changes will be discarded.
publication_status_public_failed: Publication state changed, but the public update failed.
publication_result_public_failed: Source status changed, but public artifacts did not finish updating.
publication_result_published: Moment is published and public output has been updated.
publication_result_unpublished: Moment is draft again and public output has been cleaned up.
publication_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload before changing publication state.
readiness_action_busy: Wait for the current save or public update to finish.
media_refresh_save_first: Save source changes before refreshing media.
prose_import_preview_invalid: Staged prose is not ready to import.
prose_import_confirm_overwrite: Overwrite existing prose source at {target_path} with staged file {staging_path}?
prose_import_result_success: Prose imported to {target_path} at {completed_at}. Publish the moment or save the published moment to update public output.
delete_status_deleting: Deleting moment, generated files, media, and search record...
delete_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload before deleting again.
delete_confirm_default: Delete this moment and its generated files, media, and search record?
field_required_published_date: Published moments require a published date.
summary_rebuild_needed: public update failed in this session
summary_rebuild_current: source and public moment are aligned in this session
